title: Junior Instructional Designer at Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies
company: Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies family as a Instructional Designer in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies:
Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies!
